title: Starbound (AlienEvolution Addon)
description: Starbound is an addon to alien evolution that consists of space related aliens
body:
**Starbound** is an **Alien evolution addon** which brings a  range of new **custom Aliens** to the game, currently I only have starman and moonman alien ready but I have more planned and will be working on them!

Googly Eyes are equipable ;)

**Starman**\-

Starmans power set consists of,

**Starbeam**\- a powerful lazer which makes your enemys glow upon near contact.

**Meteor Strike**\- This move brings down a meteor which brings a mid to high damage move to his powers.

**Solar charge**\- This move gives Starman a chance to charge up mid battle incase he runs out of energy.

**Orbital sun lazer**\- this is by far starmans most powerful move but comes with a cost of high cooldown and energy usage.

**Obtainments**\-

**starman**\- to obtain starman you need to:

craft a star -you can do this by:

```
   -crafting a star: 4xrubet gold, 4xstar ingots and a nether star

   -crafting googly eyes: 2xglass,2xcoal and 2xquartz and combine the eyes

   -combine the star and the googly eyes to get starman 

   -Right click on starman to obtain the powers
(you obtain rubet gold  and star ingots by finding the crashed ship structure or the star temple structure)
```

**Moonman**\-

Moonmans power set consists of,

**Push away**\- lowers nearby entitys gravity and pushes them away.

**slam into the ground**\- basically just hurt stuff in a radius.

**harden your rocky body**\- makes it tougher for entitys to kill you.

**throw a small pebble**\- throw a tiny but powerful pebble.

**Obtainments**\-

**moonman**\- to obtain moonman you need to:

craft a moon -you can do this by:

```
   -crafting a moon: 4xrubet gold, 4xmoon fragments and a rock

   -crafting googly eyes: 2xglass,2xcoal and 2xquartz and combine the eyes

   -combine the moon and the googly eyes to get moonman 

   -to obtain rock just fill every slot of your crafting table with cobblestone
   
   -DO NOT COMBINE ROCK AND GOOGLY EYES :wink: :wink:

   -Right click on moonman to obtain the powers
(you obtain rubet gold  and moonfragments by finding the crashed asteroid structure or the star temple structure)
```

-Made by yours truely Zero
